enriched_points.expanded_content: Fractal geometry offers a robust framework for studying irregular sets, emphasizing concepts like self-similarity and various notions of dimension.
Fractal geometry finds applications across disciplines such as physics, biology, and computer graphics, enhancing our understanding of complex natural phenomena.
Ongoing research in multifractal theory and its applications promises new insights and advancements in technology, art, and environmental science.
